white_thread_source_summary.H_WT_form: Hermitian correlation-space Hamiltonian with Omega_ij |i><j| + h.c.
white_thread_source_summary.Omega_ij_status: Omega_ij = Omega0 * f(|W_ij|, delta_arg_W_ij, ...); f is bounded but not explicitly derived in the available short docs
white_thread_source_summary.consequence: unitary/open-path holonomy gives phase memory; a strong amplitude gate requires an additional explicit map f or path-integral evaluation

strict_short_doc_range.interpretation: Short-doc OIB phase layer can produce only few-percent amplitude variation even across a full torus turn if used directly.

rows.reason: strict W_ij/OIB short-doc layer is phase/promille-scale; strong diagnostic F requires extra path-integral/topological amplitude not specified by available short docs

decision.allowed_next_step: derive explicit White-Thread path-integral/amplitude map f before any charged-lepton benchmark or closure claim
decision.denied_next_step: using the large F table as a mass solver input or declaring it first-principles without reproducing the integration
